'''Robetheri''' was a [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsister]] [[War Chief]] from the misty [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]]. In the later years of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the witch ruled over the [[Warden/Legends|wardens]] of an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Prison/Legends|prison]] as a dark [[King/Legends|queen]].

==Biography==
A [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] from [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]], [[Sister (Witches of Dathomir)|Sister]] Robetheri was born to a [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsister]] coven. She grew up learning the secrets of [[Dathomir Magic|Shadow Magic]] as well as fighting techniques. Thanks to her success on the battlefield, Robetheri eventually attained the rank of [[War Chief]] and rose to power in her clan.<ref name="GATORW" />

During the wake of the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Robetheri controlled the [[Dathomir Imperial Prison|Imperial prison]] located north of the [[Great Canyon (Dathomir)/Legends|Great Canyon]]. The witch had turned the prison's defenders into her puppets and set up a throne room in the late warden's office. She ruled over her people with an iron fist and had plans of conquering the entire planet, but she was overthrown by a group of [[Light side of the Force/Legends|light side]] Witches.<ref name="GATORW" />

==Personality and traits==
Robetheri had a pale but beautiful face, with black lightning-shaped [[Tattoo/Legends|tattoos]] radiating from her [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. She had the [[Hair/Legends|hair]] from her head shaven completely.<ref name="GATORW" />

==Powers and abilities==
Like many other Force witches, Robetheri was gifted with [[Force power/Legends|Force powers]] such as [[Force storm (weather)|Summon Storm]], [[Animal bond|Animal Affinity]], and [[Telekinesis/Legends#Force Flight|Force Flight]]. A capable warrior, Robetheri wielded a [[Force weapon|Force-imbued]] [[Quarterstaff/Legends|quarterstaff]], but she was also proficient with [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistols]].<ref name="GATORW" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-03-24 -->''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''
